what_it_does: This file is a JSON allocation batch that lists six source files from the claude-ds project, all located under the atomicity directory, for interpretive ledger processing.
observations: All six entries share the same project value 'claude-ds' and root '/home/tim/company/design/claude-ds'.
Every listed path resides under the 'atomicity/' directory.
The list pairs model/engine files with JSX files: atlas-model.js with Atlas.jsx, and explore-engine.js with Explore.jsx.
No code symbols are included; the file is purely a manifest.
Each entry uses the same object shape: project, path, root.
standouts: A CSS file (atomicity.css) appears alongside JavaScript/JSX modules.
Paired model/engine and JSX files suggest a subsystem split between data logic and UI components.
The file itself is an allocation batch in a wave-002 interpretive ledger.
concerns: No explicit batch purpose or grouping rationale is recorded.
No symbol metadata is present even though the entries are code files.
No timestamp or version field documents when the batch was created.
notes: This is a wave-002 allocation manifest that batches six claude-ds atomicity files for interpretive ledger processing.
questions: What criteria placed these six files specifically in batch-016?
Is this batch intended for a particular interpretive task or theme?
Why is atomicity.css included alongside JS/JSX modules?
purpose_vs_actual: The path indicates it is an allocation batch for interpretive processing, and the content matches that purpose by listing source files with project and root metadata.
intention_signals: It appears to group the atomicity subsystem files into a single interpretive batch so the ledger can process them together as a related design/code substrate set.
contribution: Provides a neutral, file-local manifest of the atomicity subsystem's source files, giving downstream fusion queries a bounded batch scope for interpretation and relationship discovery.
summary_for_embedding: A JSON allocation batch listing six source files from the claude-ds atomicity directory for interpretive ledger processing.
intention_for_embedding: To batch the atomicity subsystem files for neutral interpretive analysis in wave-002.
